name: STICKY Climbing Gym
addressFull: 61/23 Moo 1, Huai Yai, Bang Lamung District, Chon Buri 20150
hours: Tue-Sun 11:00-20:00; closed Mondays and the first day of each month

pricing.dropIn: Adult day pass ฿350; teenager ฿200; youth ฿250; child age 1-5 ฿100; equipment extra
pricing.monthly: Adult one month ฿2,000 including shoes; three months ฿5,580 including shoes; annual ฿20,400 including shoes
pricing.privateTraining: Staff belayer ฿300 per hour or ฿150 per 30 minutes for up to four people; harness included, admission and shoes extra
pricing.notes: These prices remain published on the legacy official Bean Cow site after the venue's Google and social branding changed to STICKY. The current Facebook hours supersede the old rates-page hours. Confirm all rates under the new brand before travelling. First visits historically included a free 10-minute orientation and one staff belay.

classes.schedule: Open climbing during published hours; current lesson times are not published.
classes.levels: Beginner through intermediate, with lead-climbing facilities for experienced climbers

history.ownership: The venue retains Bean Cow web and social URLs but is currently named STICKY Climbing Gym on Google and current Facebook posts.
history.notableEvents: The same address and Facebook identity establish STICKY as a rebrand of Bean Cow rather than a separate climbing discovery. The rebrand date and any ownership change were not published.

audience.whoShouldSkip: Advanced climbers seeking a large competition-style bouldering facility should check the current route mix; reviewers most consistently describe the gym as beginner-to-intermediate.

praise: Recent first-time visitors praise clear beginner instruction and supportive staff.
Reviewers like the all-day format, value and recurring route resets.
Families and mixed-skill groups describe the venue as welcoming and accessible.
complaints: The gym is not air-conditioned; recent reviewers mention the heat but generally say it remained manageable.

comparison.differentiator: The only verified open dedicated climbing gym in greater Pattaya in this batch, offering bouldering, top-rope and lead climbing at one Huai Yai venue.

sources.label: Bean Cow legacy official website and rates
Google Maps current STICKY listing and reviews

unverified: current phone number after the STICKY rebrand
